name: Ferplast Adj. Padded Muzzle Medium
description: Key Features • Premium Material & Comfort: Crafted from durable nylon with soft padded edges to protect the dog’s snout from irritation, ensuring comfort even during extended wear. • Fully Adjustable Fit: Equipped with nylon straps and Velcro adjustments to achieve a snug, secure fit. Suitable for dogs with a nose circumference (A) of 46–80 cm and length (B) of 20–25 cm. • Functional Design: Open-front structure allows the dog to pant freely and drink water while wearing the muzzle, ensuring both safety and comfort. • Secure Closure: Features a robust buckle with a plastic hook clasp to keep the muzzle firmly in place. • Lightweight & Practical: Weighs approximately 85 g, making it comfortable for the dog to wear and easy for owners to handle. The nylon material is simple to clean and maintain. Suitable For Medium-sized dog breeds with average snout lengths, ideal for training sessions, vet visits, grooming, or safe public outings. Additional Information Designed and manufactured in Italy by Ferplast renowned for high-quality, pet-friendly products the Adjustable Padded Muzzle delivers the perfect balance of safety, comfort, and functionality. For short-nosed breeds, Ferplast recommends the Safe Boxer model, designed specifically for brachycephalic dogs. If you’d like, I can also create a short, sales-oriented version that works perfectly for online product listings or packaging. That would make it more appealing at first glance while keeping the key details.
